content:
🔥 ESP32-Bit-Pirate | C++
🎯 Primary Use Case: Hardware hacking and digital protocol analysis
✨ Key Features: • Interactive CLI via USB Serial or WiFi Web • Support for numerous protocols (I2C, SPI, UART, 1-Wire, CAN, Wi-Fi, Bluetooth, RFID, etc.) • Protocol sniffers for I2C, UART, SPI, 1Wire, 2wire, CAN, Wi-Fi, Bluetooth, SubGhz • EEPROM dump tools • Scripting using Bus Pirate-style commands
📖 Summary: ESP32 Bit Pirate is an open-source firmware that transforms an ESP32 device into a versatile hardware hacking tool. It supports a wide array of digital and radio protocols, offering features like sniffing, sending, scripting, and interactive control via a web-based CLI.
🔗 Links: • View Project • Homepage ================ 🔓 Open Source

🚀 app-store-screenshots | TypeScript
🎯 Primary Use Case: Automating the creation of professional, marketing-ready App Store and Google Play screenshots using AI.
✨ Key Features: • AI-powered screenshot generation for App Store and Google Play • Connected canvas editor for seamless element spanning • Real device frames for iOS, iPad, Android, and Play Store formats
📖 Summary: This repository provides a Next.js-based editor for generating App Store and Google Play marketing screenshots. It leverages AI coding agents to automate the creation of visually appealing and store-ready screenshot decks, complete with device frames, captions, and connected canvas layouts.
🔗 Links: • View Project • Homepage ================ 🔓 Open Source

🚀 agent | Go
🎯 Primary Use Case: To provide a flexible and scalable software agent for managing and processing video streams from various camera sources for surveillance purposes.
✨ Key Features: • Open-source video surveillance management agent • Scalable and isolated component of the Kerberos.io stack • Supports IP cameras with RTSP H264/H265 streams • Can process streams from USB cameras, Raspberry Pi cameras, etc. (via camera-to-rtsp)
📖 Summary: The Kerberos Agent is an open-source, scalable video surveillance management system designed for IP cameras and other video sources. It allows for the processing and management of video streams, enabling features like motion detection and integration into larger surveillance setups.
🔗 Links: • View Project • Homepage ================ 🔓 Open Source

💡 MATRIXON-AGENTIC-BROWSER | HTML
🎯 Primary Use Case: Smart web automation and AI-assisted browsing using a local, privacy-focused agent.
✨ Key Features: • Local LLM (GGUF models via llama.cpp) • AgentPanel sidebar AI assistant • Web search, page reading, URL navigation tools • Full-page AI chat with file attachments and LaTeX • AI-summarized web search results
📖 Summary: MATRIXON Agentic Browser is an open-source, privacy-focused desktop browser built with Electron. It integrates a fully local AI assistant powered by llama.cpp and GGUF models, enabling smart web automation and interaction without relying on cloud services or API keys.
🔗 Links: • View Project ================ 🔓 Open Source

🚀 cobalt | Python
🎯 Primary Use Case: Self-hosting and managing game servers for personal use or small groups.
✨ Key Features: • Easy game server creation and management • Real-time CPU and RAM usage monitoring • User and role management with access control • File manager and editor for configuration files • Web dashboard accessible from any device
📖 Summary: Cobalt is a self-hosted web dashboard designed for easily creating and managing game servers on your own VPS. It offers a user-friendly interface for server setup, command execution, resource monitoring, and user access control, making it a cost-effective alternative to specialized hosting platforms.
🔗 Links: • View Project ================ 🔓 Open Source

🚀 telegram-anonymous-feedback-bot | Python
🎯 Primary Use Case: Enabling users to receive anonymous feedback or messages through Telegram, with options for managing senders and an optional premium feature to identify them.
✨ Key Features: • Personalized anonymous message links • Customizable link text • Anonymous text, photo, and video messages • Direct replies to anonymous messages • Personal sender blocking
📖 Summary: This Python Telegram bot allows users to receive anonymous messages via a unique personal link, with features for replying, blocking senders, and an optional premium system to reveal sender identities. It also includes an admin panel for bot management.
🔗 Links: • View Project ================ 🔓 Open Source
